name: Expensify, Inc.
business: Expensify is a cloud-based expense management software platform that helps businesses simplify managing money. As of December 31, 2025, it has over 15 million members and has processed over 1.8 billion expense transactions. For the year ended December 31, 2025, an average of 650,000 paid members across 39,700 companies in over 200 countries used the platform.

exposures.sentence: Expensify is a leading cloud-based expense management software platform that helps the smallest to the largest businesses simplify the way they manage money.

catalysts.sentence: Substantially all Expensify Card cardholders as of December 31, 2025 are under our updated program (the Updated Card Program ), which launched in February 2024.

catalysts.event: Release of F1 The Movie (marketing sponsorship)
catalysts.sentence: For example, in 2024 and 2025, we invested in a promotional marketing opportunity to have Expensify heavily featured in Apple's biggest budget film, F1 The Movie , which was released in theaters on June 27, 2025.
On July 1, 2025, we terminated the revolving credit facility under the 2024 Amended Loan and Security Agreement.

catalysts.event: Increase of Letter of Credit to $7.5 million
catalysts.sentence: On April 16, 2025, we entered into an amendment to the irrevocable standby letter of credit to increase the Letter of Credit to $7.5 million.

On February 25, 2025, the Executive Committee approved a new share repurchase program with authorization to purchase up to $50.0 million of shares of Class A common stock that expires on March 31, 2028 ( 2025 Share Repurchase Program ).
